title: Glue stat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|glue}}
A '''glue stat''' was a medical substance developed shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and was made from [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] tissue and an adhesive made from [[Talusian mussel]]s. It could be placed on a laceration, and would dissolve, sealing the opening.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''
*{{InsiderCite|83|MedStar: Intermezzo|reprint=1}}
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
